items.name: yetone/kill-ai-slop
items.full_text: A field guide to the visual & copy tics of AI-generated products — and an Agent Skill that scans your project and strips them out. https://killaislop.com

items.name: dongguatanglinux/grok-build-auth
items.full_text: Protocol research client: x.ai signup → SSO → Grok Build OAuth → CLIProxyAPI auth export (authorized use only)

items.name: VoidTherapist31/MecchaChameleon-MecchaBionix
items.full_text: MecchaBionix is the ultimate exploitation suite for MECCHA CHAMELEON – the viral stealth hit with 10M+ copies sold and 340k peak players. Unlock a lethal arsenal: X-Ray Vision, Silent Lock, Zero Gravity, Shadow Step, Death Shield, Bottomless Chroma, and more. Dominate every lobby and reign as the undisputed master of disguise!
